sourcesContent:
// ─── Studio Info ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const STUDIO = {
  name: "Raga Moments",
  tagline: "Capturing Every Celebration",
  subTagline: "South India's Premier Wedding & Celebration Studio",
  phone: "+91 98765 43210",
  email: "hello@ragamoments.in",
  location: "Chennai, Tamil Nadu",
  instagram: "@ragamoments",
  established: "Est. 2012",
};

// ─── Categories ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const CATEGORIES = [
  { key: "all",         label: "All"          },
  { key: "wedding",     label: "Weddings"     },
  { key: "birthday",    label: "Birthdays"    },
  { key: "anniversary", label: "Anniversary"  },
  { key: "engagement",  label: "Engagement"   },
  { key: "naming",      label: "Naming Ceremony" },
  { key: "portrait",    label: "Portraits"    },
];

// ─── Photo Gallery ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const PHOTOS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1583939003579-730e3918a45a?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Sacred Vows",
    client: "Priya & Aravind",
    category: "wedding",
    location: "Kapaleeshwarar Temple, Chennai",
    date: "Feb 2024",
    style: "Traditional Hindu",
    aspect: "tall",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519741497674-611481863552?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Golden Hour Bride",
    client: "Meenakshi",
    category: "wedding",
    location: "ITC Grand Chola, Chennai",
    date: "Jan 2024",
    style: "Bridal Portrait",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464366400600-7168b8af9bc3?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "First Birthday Magic",
    client: "Baby Arjun",
    category: "birthday",
    location: "The Leela Palace, Chennai",
    date: "Mar 2024",
    style: "Themed Celebration",
    aspect: "square",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606800052052-a08af7148866?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "25 Years Together",
    client: "Lakshmi & Venkat",
    category: "anniversary",
    location: "Taj Coromandel, Chennai",
    date: "Mar 2024",
    style: "Silver Jubilee",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1591604021695-0c69b7c05981?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Ring Ceremony",
    client: "Divya & Karthik",
    category: "engagement",
    location: "Crowne Plaza, Adyar",
    date: "Apr 2024",
    style: "South Indian Engagement",
    aspect: "tall",
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578898886225-c7c894047899?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Sweet Sixteen",
    client: "Anjali",
    category: "birthday",
    location: "Radisson Blu, Egmore",
    date: "Apr 2024",
    style: "Birthday Bash",
    aspect: "square",
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511285560929-80b456fea0bc?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Mandap Moments",
    client: "Kavya & Suresh",
    category: "wedding",
    location: "Sri Parthasarathy Temple, Triplicane",
    date: "May 2024",
    style: "Brahmin Wedding",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529636798458-92182e662485?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Bridal Portraits",
    client: "Nithya",
    category: "wedding",
    location: "Mahabalipuram Shore",
    date: "May 2024",
    style: "Outdoor Bridal",
    aspect: "tall",
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533174072545-7a4b6ad7a6c3?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "50th Celebrations",
    client: "Dr. Rajan",
    category: "birthday",
    location: "Vivanta Chennai",
    date: "Jun 2024",
    style: "Milestone Birthday",
    aspect: "square",
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600093463592-8e36ae95ef56?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Naming Ceremony",
    client: "Baby Sai Lakshmi",
    category: "naming",
    location: "Home Ceremony, Mylapore",
    date: "Jun 2024",
    style: "Traditional Naming",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1610173827900-9b2a6e8b62b8?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Forever Together",
    client: "Geetha & Ramesh",
    category: "anniversary",
    location: "Pondicherry Beachside",
    date: "Jul 2024",
    style: "Golden Anniversary",
    aspect: "tall",
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537633552985-df8429e8048b?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "The Promise",
    client: "Sneha & Vijay",
    category: "engagement",
    location: "Besant Nagar Beach, Chennai",
    date: "Jul 2024",
    style: "Candid Engagement",
    aspect: "square",
  },
  {
    id: 13,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488521787991-ed7bbaae773c?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Studio Portrait",
    client: "The Krishnan Family",
    category: "portrait",
    location: "Raga Moments Studio, T Nagar",
    date: "Aug 2024",
    style: "Family Portrait",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
  {
    id: 14,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550005809-91ad75fb315f?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "First Year Memories",
    client: "Baby Rithvik",
    category: "birthday",
    location: "Raga Moments Studio, T Nagar",
    date: "Aug 2024",
    style: "Baby Photoshoot",
    aspect: "tall",
  },
  {
    id: 15,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1520854221256-17451cc331bf?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Wedding Candids",
    client: "Ananya & Rohan",
    category: "wedding",
    location: "Kanchipuram Temple",
    date: "Sep 2024",
    style: "Candid Wedding",
    aspect: "square",
  },
  {
    id: 16,
    src: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1587271339318-2e78b4e9e475?w=1200&q=85&fm=jpg",
    title: "Anniversary Shoot",
    client: "Padma & Suresh",
    category: "anniversary",
    location: "ECR Beach Resort",
    date: "Sep 2024",
    style: "Couple Portrait",
    aspect: "wide",
  },
];

// ─── Marquee Labels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const MARQUEE_ITEMS = [
  "Wedding Photography",
  "Birthday Celebrations",
  "South Indian Weddings",
  "Anniversary Shoots",
  "Baby & Naming Ceremony",
  "Engagement Sessions",
  "Candid Photography",
  "Traditional Moments",
  "Family Portraits",
  "Chennai · Tamil Nadu",
];

// ─── Services ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const SERVICES = [
  {
    icon: "💍",
    title: "Wedding Photography",
    desc: "Full-day coverage of your sacred union — from mehendi and sangeet to the final vidai. Traditional & candid both.",
    price: "From ₹45,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "🎂",
    title: "Birthday & Milestones",
    desc: "First birthdays, sweet sixteens, 50th milestones — every age deserves a beautiful frame.",
    price: "From ₹12,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "💛",
    title: "Anniversary Celebrations",
    desc: "Silver, golden, or any year in between — celebrate the years with portraits as timeless as your love.",
    price: "From ₹15,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "💫",
    title: "Engagement Sessions",
    desc: "Candid pre-wedding and ring ceremony shoots that capture the joy of your new beginning.",
    price: "From ₹18,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "👶",
    title: "Naming & Baby Ceremonies",
    desc: "Naamkaran, cradle ceremonies, and baby portraits — tiny moments, lifelong memories.",
    price: "From ₹8,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "👨‍👩‍👧",
    title: "Family Portraits",
    desc: "Studio and outdoor family sessions — perfect for festivals, reunions, and yearly traditions.",
    price: "From ₹6,000",
  },
];

// ─── Testimonials ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const TESTIMONIALS = [
  {
    name: "Priya Aravind",
    event: "Wedding — Feb 2024",
    text: "Raga Moments captured every ritual so beautifully. Our families still talk about the photos. Truly the best in Chennai!",
    rating: 5,
  },
  {
    name: "Lakshmi & Venkat",
    event: "25th Anniversary — Mar 2024",
    text: "We felt like newlyweds again during the shoot. The team made us so comfortable. Every photo is a treasure.",
    rating: 5,
  },
  {
    name: "Dr. Rajan",
    event: "50th Birthday — Jun 2024",
    text: "Professional, creative, and so warm. The candid shots at my birthday were priceless. Highly recommended!",
    rating: 5,
  },
];

// ─── View Route Definitions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const VIEWS = [
  { key: "gallery", label: "Gallery", path: "/gallery" },
  { key: "services", label: "Services", path: "/services" },
  { key: "contact",  label: "Contact",  path: "/contact"  },
];
